name: ELI LILLY & Co
business: Eli Lilly discovers, develops, manufactures, and markets human pharmaceutical products in a single segment. Its products are sold in approximately 90 countries. In the U.S., most products are distributed through wholesalers serving pharmacies, physicians, hospitals, and other healthcare providers.

exposures.sentence: We discover, develop, manufacture, and market products in a single business segment human pharmaceutical products.
In certain jurisdictions, we utilize LillyDirect, our direct-to-patient digital health care platform, to provide delivery of select Lilly medicines dispensed by third-party pharmacies to patients.

Failure, inadequacy, breach of, or unauthorized access to, our IT systems or those of our third-party service providers, unauthorized access to our confidential information, or violations of data protection laws, could result in material harm to our business and reputation.

catalysts.event: Medicare beneficiaries will have access to discounted Lilly obesity medicines
catalysts.sentence: As part of these agreements, we expect Medicare beneficiaries will have access to discounted Lilly obesity medicines by July 1, 2026, and States will have the option to expand access to these discounted medicines through Medicaid.

catalysts.event: Quarterly dividend increase to $1.73 per share
catalysts.sentence: The quarterly dividend was increased to $1.73 per share effective for the dividend to be paid in the first quarter of 2026, resulting in an indicated annual rate for 2026 of $6.92 per share.
